features.name: Spider Climb
features.description: The spider can climb difficult surfaces, including along ceilings, without needing to make an ability check.

features.name: Web Walker
features.description: The spider ignores movement restrictions caused by webs, and the spider knows the location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

actions.name: Bite
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1 Piercing damage plus 2 (1d4) Poison damage.

tactical_info.positioning: Uses Spider Climb for ceiling ambushes and web navigation
tactical_info.damage_output: 3 total damage (1 piercing + 2 poison) per hit
tactical_info.key_abilities: Spider Climb and Web Walker for superior positioning
tactical_info.weaknesses: Extremely low HP, minimal individual threat
tactical_info.synergies: Effective in web-filled areas or as environmental hazards
